bankName: Lending and bank accounts, both associated with BSB number 939 200

detail.name: Professional Package
detail.description: A home loan with fixed, variable and Line of Credit options. Offsets are available for variable loans. A package fee is applicable.
detail.brandName: Lending and bank accounts, both associated with BSB number 939 200

fees.name: Multiple Security Fee
fees.additionalInfo: Per security. Payable for each additional security offered at loan establishment. Fee is not refundable.

fees.name: Master Limit application fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when a master limit is requested. This fee covers processing and administration of the establishment and ongoing maintenance of your Master Limit.

fees.name: Valuation fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when valuation costs associated with a loan application or variation exceed $550. If applicable, we will advise you of any excess valuation costs payable prior to the valuation.

fees.name: Fixed rate lock fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable at settlement where you have requested that we secure the fixed interest rate on a fixed rate loan. Fixed rates will be locked for 90 days from the day the request is received. The fee is not refundable

fees.name: Rework fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when a loan agreement or variation to loan agreement is re-issued due to changes requested by either you or the introducer.

fees.name: AMP internal refinance fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable on settlement. Payable on settlement where you had an AMP Bank loan immediately before establishment of this loan and that loan was refinanced or otherwise replaced with this loan, either in part or in whole.

fees.name: Break costs
fees.additionalInfo: Payable if at any time before the fixed interest period expires: You make additional repayments above the minimum required payments exceeding $10,000 for each 12 month period within a fixed interest period; or You repay all of the money owing under the facility during any fixed interest period before it is due; or We agree to change your annual percentage rate during your fixed interest period (this includes a change to your annual percentage ratedue to a change to your repayment type [principal andinterest or interest only] or a change to your loan purpose [owner occupied or investment]). Break costs can be substantial. The amount which is our estimate of loss (if any) resulting from the relevant event.  A 12 month period is defined as the time from the date the fixed interest period commenced to the initial anniversary of that date and each consecutive anniversary thereafter until the fixed interest period expires. Refer to your Loan Conditions for more information.

fees.name: Discharge fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we are requested to discharge all securities. Customers also pay the actual solicitors' or mortgage processing servicers' costs, which include,for example, search fees and postage, valuation costs if applicable and any applicable Government fees, which may vary from state to state.

fees.name: Verification of identity by Australia Post
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you obtain a Verification of Identity service from an Australia Post office.

fees.name: Payment dishonour fees
fees.additionalInfo: You may be charged a fee by an external bank or financial institution for a transaction relating to your loan (eg. if a payment to your loan made from another bank is dishonoured, the other bank may charge you a fee).

fees.name: Solicitors and mortgage processing servicers' cost
fees.additionalInfo: Whenever a new loan agreement is established and we instruct our solicitors or mortgage processing servicers' to act on our behalf in connection with this agreement or a security.

fees.name: Solicitors' and mortgage processing servicers' incidental costs
fees.additionalInfo: Per security property. Whenever a variation to an existing loan agreement is made and we instruct our solicitors or mortgage processing servicers to act on our behalf in connection with the security property(s).

fees.name: Solicitor or mortgage processing servicer non-standard additional costs
fees.additionalInfo: Non-standard additional costs that may be payable, including courier costs, telegraphic transfer costs, cost to arrange settlement in a remote area and costs for urgent preparation of documents and/or urgent settlement.

fees.name: International ATM cash withdrawal fee
fees.additionalInfo: When you withdraw from your account at any international ATM

fees.name: Currency conversion fee
fees.additionalInfo: When you use your AMP Visa Debit card to make a purchase overseas or withdraw from an ATM overseas in a foreign currency and the transaction is converted to Australian dollars

fees.name: Emergency replacement AMP Visa Debit Card fee
fees.additionalInfo: When you request urgent delivery of a replacement access card

fees.name: Telegraphic transfer fee - deposits
fees.additionalInfo: When funds are transferred to youraccount (by SWIFTor telegraphic transfer) from a bank in Australia or overseas (in Australian dollars).

fees.name: Telegraphic transfer fee - withdrawals
fees.additionalInfo: When you request us to transfer funds from your account (by SWIFT) to a bank in Australia (in Australian dollars). When you request us to transfer fundsfrom your account (by telegraphic transfer) to an overseas bank (in Australian dollars or a foreign currency).

fees.name: Transaction trace fee
fees.additionalInfo: When you request us to investigate and trace a transaction

fees.name: Visa dispute fee
fees.additionalInfo: When you dispute a Visa transaction and we do not find in your favour

fees.name: Audit certificate fee
fees.additionalInfo: When you or an auditor request an audit certificate for your account

fees.name: Annual package fee
fees.additionalInfo: Payable in arrears for packages, eligibilitiy requirements may apply. $6 monthly account management fee is payable on the offset deposit account when linked to a Basic Variable Rate Loan.

fees.name: $0 Professional Package variation fee
fees.additionalInfo: This fee is waived for this package type

fees.name: $0 Professional Package application fee
fees.additionalInfo: This fee is waived for this package type

fees.name: $0 Professional Package Settlement fee
fees.additionalInfo: This fee is waived for this package type

fees.name: $0 Professional package monthly fee
fees.additionalInfo: This fee is waived for this package type

fees.name: $0 Professional package redraw fee
fees.additionalInfo: This fee is waived for this package type

features.additionalInfo: Redraw applies to AMP Bank variable rate home loans only. You can access extra funds you’ve deposited at any time, with no withdrawal fees when using online banking, the AMP app, BankPhone or BankAssist. Minimum amounts and daily limits may apply.
You can choose to set up an Offset Deposit Account on a variable rate loan. A $6 monthly account management fee is payable on the Offset Deposit Account when linked to a Basic Variable Rate Loan.
A card is available for the product to access funds
Service fees may apply for manual redraw requests or special services.

features.additionalValue: Apple Pay, Samsung Pay or Google Pay
features.additionalInfo: Customers can link eligible AMP accounts to Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Samsung Pay for secure and convenient digital wallet transactions.
Customers can access and manage their home loan online via My AMP, our secure digital banking platform, offering features for easy account monitoring and transactions.
Construction available for up to a 12 month interest only period

AMP home loans allow for flexible additional repayments to reduce interest and pay off loans faster. Variable rate loans allow unlimited extra repayments, while fixed-rate loans often limit these to $10,000 per 12-month period. Please refer to Loan Conditions and Credit guide for more information on the consequences of repaying your Fixed Rate Loan early

AMP home loans are protected by secure login, encryption, transaction monitoring, and customer alerts to help prevent and detect fraud. Support is available for customers in the event of suspected unauthorised activity.

AMP Bank home loans allow eligible applicants to use a guarantor, typically a close family member who provides additional security for the loan. This can help customers who have a limited deposit or may not meet standard lending criteria. Guarantor eligibility is subject to AMP Bank’s lending requirements and the guarantor’s financial position.

constraints.additionalInfo: Minimum lending amount for new home loans is $100,000
The loan term ranges from a minimum of 10 years to a maximum of 30 years

eligibility.additionalInfo: Individual borrowers must be Permanent residents or citizens of Australia, All new to bank customers must be living and working in Australia
Eligible customers must be at least 18 years of age
